# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-from-ingress
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress
          namespace: linkerd-viz

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-http
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-from-frontend
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: api-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-grpc
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-from-api
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-http
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-from-api
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: apps

---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-http
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-from-api
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: apps

---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-http
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-from-orders
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notifications-http
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notifications
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notifications-from-orders
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: notifications-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: reporting-http
  namespace: apps
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: reporting
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: reporting-from-api
  namespace: apps
spec:
  server:
    name: reporting-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: apps
        - name: frontend
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: postgres-tcp
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: postgres
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: postgres-from-api
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: postgres-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: apps
        - name: auth
          namespace: apps
        - name: orders
          namespace: apps
        - name: inventory
          namespace: apps

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: redis-tcp
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis
  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: redis-from-apps
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: redis-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: apps
        - name: frontend
          namespace: apps
        - name: orders
          namespace: apps
        - name: notifications
          namespace: apps
